betterquesting:10.desc:8:
A living, breathing Nether with diverse biomes, unique flora, and native metallurgy. Mine Cincinnasite, explore Nether Cities, and cultivate underworld crops.

Progression:
    Cincinnasite Metallurgy - Nether-native metal tools and architecture
    Nether Ecology & Biomes - Biomes, flora, and agriculture
